translations.en: This reminds me of my youth.
translations.de: Das erinnert mich an meine Jugend.
translations.it: Questo mi ricorda la mia giovinezza.
translations.ko: 이건 내 젊은 시절을 떠올리게 한다.
translations.yue: 呢個令我想起我嘅青春。
translations.vi: Điều này làm tôi nhớ về tuổi trẻ của mình.
translations.nl: Dit doet me denken aan mijn jeugd.
translations.hi: यह मुझे मेरी जवानी की याद दिलाता है.
translations.el: Αυτό μου θυμίζει τη νεότητά μου.
translations.nb: Dette minner meg om ungdommen min.
translations.id: Ini mengingatkan saya pada masa muda saya.
translations.sv: Detta påminner mig om min ungdom.
translations.ro: Asta îmi amintește de tinerețea mea.
translations.da: Det minder mig om min ungdom.
translations.ja: これは私の青春を思い出させる。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative pronoun, 3rd person singular; subject of the clause referring to something previously mentioned or understood.
Clitic object pronoun, 1st person singular, dative/indirect object; placed before the verb and marks the experiencer (à moi) of 'rappeler'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive construction 'rappeler quelque chose à quelqu’un' with 'ma jeunesse' as direct object and 'me' as indirect object.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular possessor; feminine singular form agreeing with 'jeunesse'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'rappelle'.

sentences.target: Il parle souvent de sa jeunesse.

translations.fr: Il parle souvent de sa jeunesse.
translations.en: He often talks about his youth.
translations.es: Él habla a menudo de su juventud.
translations.de: Er spricht oft über seine Jugend.
translations.it: Lui parla spesso della sua giovinezza.
translations.ko: 그는 종종 자신의 젊은 시절에 대해 이야기한다.
translations.ru: Он часто рассказывает о своей юности.
translations.pt: Ele costuma falar sobre sua juventude.
translations.he: הוא מדבר לעיתים קרובות על נעוריו.
translations.vi: Anh ấy thường nói về tuổi trẻ của mình.
translations.nl: Hij praat vaak over zijn jeugd.
translations.uk: Він часто говорить про свою юність.
translations.hi: वह अक्सर अपनी जवानी के बारे में बात करता है.
translations.pl: On często mówi o swojej młodości.
translations.el: Μιλάει συχνά για τη νεότητά του.
translations.nb: Han snakker ofte om ungdommen sin.
translations.id: Dia sering berbicara tentang masa mudanya.
translations.sv: Han pratar ofta om sin ungdom.
translations.ro: El vorbește adesea despre tinerețea lui.
translations.cs: On často mluví o svém mládí.
translations.da: Han taler ofte om sin ungdom.
translations.ja: 彼はよく自分の青春について話す。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person singular masculine; subject of 'parle'.
Intransitive verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes a prepositional complement with 'de'.
Adverb of frequency modifying the verb 'parle'.
Preposition introducing the complement 'sa jeunesse' (topic/content of speaking).
Possessive determiner, 3rd person singular possessor; feminine singular form agreeing with 'jeunesse' and coreferential with 'Il'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'de' forming a prepositional phrase.

translations.en: My youth is far away now.
translations.es: Mi juventud queda ya muy lejos.
translations.de: Meine Jugend liegt jetzt weit zurück.
translations.it: La mia giovinezza è ormai lontana.
translations.ko: 이제 내 젊은 시절은 멀리 지나갔다.
translations.yue: 我嘅青春而家已經遠去。
translations.ru: Моя юность теперь уже далеко позади.
translations.pt: Minha juventude agora está bem distante.
translations.vi: Tuổi trẻ của tôi giờ đã xa rồi.
translations.nl: Mijn jeugd is nu ver achter me.
translations.uk: Моя юність тепер вже далеко позаду.
translations.hu: A fiatalságom most már messze van mögöttem.
translations.hi: मेरी जवानी अब बहुत पीछे रह गई है.
translations.pl: Moja młodość είναι teraz daleko za mną.
translations.el: Η νεότητά μου είναι πλέον μακριά.
translations.nb: Ungdommen min er nå langt bak meg.
translations.id: Masa muda saya kini sudah jauh di belakang.
translations.sv: Min ungdom är nu långt bakom mig.
translations.ro: Tinerețea mea este acum departe în urmă.
translations.cs: Moje mládí je teď už daleko za mnou.
translations.da: Min ungdom er nu langt bag mig.
translations.ja: 私の青春は今では遠くなった。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 1st person singular possessor; feminine singular form agreeing with 'jeunesse'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd person singular; links the subject to the predicate ('loin').
Adverb used predicatively as a complement with the copula; expresses distance (figurative here).
Temporal adverb; situates the statement in the present time.

sentences.target: On aide la jeunesse du quartier.

translations.fr: On aide la jeunesse du quartier.
translations.es: Ayudamos a los jóvenes del barrio.
translations.de: Wir helfen den Jugendlichen im Viertel.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们帮助社区的年轻人。
translations.yue: 我哋幫社區入面嘅年輕人。
translations.vi: Chúng tôi giúp đỡ thanh niên trong khu phố.
translations.nl: Wij helpen de jongeren in de wijk.
translations.hi: हम मोहल्ले के युवाओं की मदद करते हैं.
translations.id: Kami membantu anak-anak muda di lingkungan.
translations.ro: Îi ajutăm pe tinerii din cartier.
translations.da: Vi hjælper de unge i kvarteret.
translations.ja: 私たちは地域の若者を支援する。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun, grammatically 3rd person singular; generic agent ('people/we').
Transitive verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes a direct object ('la jeunesse').
Definite article, feminine singular; determines 'jeunesse'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'aide'.
Preposition 'de' contracted with the definite article 'le' (de + le); introduces the noun complement 'quartier' modifying 'jeunesse'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'du', specifying which youth ('of the neighborhood').
